name: pwsh-native
description: Windows-native PowerShell-first stack for Claude Code in MAX AUTONOMY mode. Ships pwsh-admin as the main-thread agent (assumes UAC acceptance, installs freely via winget / Install-PSResource / cargo / bun / uv / pipx / code / claude plugin), plus pwsh-expert, win32-expert, and bun-expert specialists. Auto-wires the Microsoft Learn MCP server. Slash commands for admin workflows (install, elevate, winget upgrade, services, CIM, event log, registry). No interception hook — zero friction by design.

ms_repos_path.title: Microsoft reference repos path
ms_repos_path.description: Absolute path to your local clones of Microsoft reference repos (Windows-classic-samples, windows-rs, CsWin32, PowerShell-Docs, etc.). Leave blank if you don't have them. Example: C:/Users/you/ms-repos
